message:
Fix hero video: center container at 1200px max-width, scale to hide CRT edges

The video container was left-aligned and wider than the nav bar (1200px).
Added max-w-[1200px] mx-auto to center it, and scale-[1.08] on the video
element to push remaining CRT border artifacts outside the overflow-hidden
clip area.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -111,14 +111,14 @@ export default function HomePage() { {/* Full-Width Video — the centrepiece */} -
+
{/* Floating Peeking Eye - Now visible on mobile with adjusted positioning */}
- + {/* Auto-playing Rio Recording */} @@ -129,7 +129,7 @@ export default function HomePage() { loop playsInline poster="/screenshots/visual_effects_clifford_attractor.webp" - className="absolute inset-0 block w-full h-full object-cover" + className="absolute inset-0 block w-full h-full object-cover scale-[1.08]" >
